name_cn:
Black patent leather quilted grid ·
CASSANDRE _Chain Bag A super practical mini bag, Italian imported top-grain cowhide, full leather interior and exterior. Exquisite handcrafted with a square grid pattern, classic metal logo adds personality, and a flap design ensures security. Removable shoulder strap, with ten card slots, one bill compartment, two dividers, and one zippered pocket inside to hold everything!
Model: 743364
Size: 23x14x3cm
Shoulder strap length: 47cm
